acceptance_criteria: The validation readiness-evaluation workflow exits successfully.
The validation gate records passing evidence in status/readiness.json.
completion_signals: Validation evaluation evidence is recorded under eval/history and linked from status/readiness.json.
escalation_conditions: Validation reports schema or contract failures that the current task scope cannot resolve safely.
tasks.summary: Run the validation readiness-evaluation workflow and capture canonical validation evidence.

acceptance_criteria: The branch helper exits successfully for semantic branch alpha.
A semantic branch checkpoint artifact is written under eval/history.
completion_signals: A semantic-branch-checkpoint-result.json artifact is recorded under eval/history for semantic branch alpha.
Canonical work-state advances after the semantic branch-alpha checkpoint completes.
escalation_conditions: The branch helper cannot read canonical state or write bounded evidence under eval/history.
tasks.summary: Record operator-reporting checkpoint evidence after validation passes.

acceptance_criteria: The branch helper exits successfully for semantic branch beta.
A semantic branch checkpoint artifact is written under eval/history.
completion_signals: A semantic-branch-checkpoint-result.json artifact is recorded under eval/history for semantic branch beta.
Canonical work-state advances after the semantic branch-beta checkpoint completes.
escalation_conditions: The branch helper cannot read canonical state or write bounded evidence under eval/history.
tasks.summary: Record schema-validation checkpoint evidence after validation passes.

acceptance_criteria: The benchmark readiness-evaluation workflow exits successfully.
Inherited benchmark gates update from not_run to pass or waived.
completion_signals: Benchmark evaluation evidence records results in eval/latest/index.json.
Required benchmark gates advance to pass or waived in status/readiness.json.
escalation_conditions: Benchmark output fails to update readiness or eval state through the existing bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Run the benchmark readiness-evaluation workflow after validation passes.
